The '''Dreadnought battle tank''' was a massive battle tank created for the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Cydon Prax]] by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

==Description==
Its weapons included [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], and a plasma pulse discharger. The missiles were launched from [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver cannons]] similar to the ones carried by the [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]].

It had heavy armor plating, and was one of the biggest hovertanks, surpassed only by the [[Protodeka]] and the [[Seismic tank/Legends|Seismic tank]].

==History==
Prax used the ship during the [[Battle of Thule|Battle of]] [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], during which he managed to destroy Mace Windu's [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|''Saber''-class fighter tank]] outside the capital (though the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] survived). Later in the battle, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], piloting his own fighter tank, moved to destroy the [[Dark Reaper]]. Prax challenged the young Jedi, and was ultimately killed when Skywalker destroyed his Dreadnought.

{{Veh-stub}}
